content.en:
"Wind Heng Controller, let's find the Border Fire Controller separately!"

Ye Tian proposed.

"Yes!" Feng Heng's controller nodded, "If I find him, I have to kill him!"

The Crowe Controller and the White Shark Controller also agreed to this suggestion, and immediately chose one direction and left one by one.

Everyone's minds are not pure, they all want to find the controller of the border fire, and then interrogate something, after all, let the master of the border fire risk offending them, there must be a big gain.

And they all want to monopolize that kind of harvest, so separating is the best choice, and naturally there are no competitors.

......

"Feng Heng Controller, they are gone, I can rest assured that I can use my copy talent to find the Border Fire Master!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Everyone doesn't want to share the benefits, and so does he.

The copy talent spreads out, probing at the limit.

Soon, the area was explored by Ye Tian.

According to his calculations, the controller of the edge fire must be in this area, with the core of the position just now, radiating around, and within the scope of this area, the controller of the edge fire will definitely be found.

If the Border Fire Masters weren't in this area, then there would be no need for him to use the four Nine Realm-level Masters as bait to attract firepower for him.

Soon.

Ye Tian used his copying talent to find the controller of the edge fire.

......

Beneath a mountain range near the inner perimeter of the wasteland, the Frontier Fire Masters are hiding.

At this point, he didn't know he had been discovered.

Suddenly.

The void cracked, and Ye Tian descended here.

"Infinite Master!!!

The Frontier Flame Keeper was shocked.

It's not easy to find someone in the wasteland, he is hiding here, and he has used all kinds of hidden secret techniques, how could Ye Tian find him, and it is so fast, as if he knows that he is here, after locking the position, he quickly came here.

"Run!"

The controller of the border fire doesn't want to be caught by Ye Tian, otherwise he will die!

However, in the face of a Nine Realms-level master, he, an eight-realm-level master, can't compete with it!

However, he estimated that Ye Tian was coming with a clone of will, and he should not be carrying any treasures, and his combat power should not be too strong, and he still had hope of escaping.

However, when Ye Tian took out the Will Blade, he was dumbfounded.

"The blade weapon that the will of the transformation realm has turned into, you are the !! of the body"

The Border Fire Master was dumbfounded.

Ye Tian obviously condensed the will of the Transformation Realm, and could form a will clone to roam outside instead of the body, but Ye Tian sent a true body, isn't this afraid of falling?

"Space-Time Rift, Slash!"

The Blade of Will slashed directly, instantly tearing apart the body of the Frontier Fire Master, and smashing him to death with a single blow.

Then.

Ye Tian directly sealed the Border Fire Controller, and then threw it aside.

"Infinite Master, let me go!"

The Frontier Fire Master begged for mercy.

"Let you go?" Ye Tian said lightly: "I haven't offended you, but you want to trap me, what do you say I should do with you?"

"I'm not cheating on you, I'm just trying to attract a few Nine Realm-level controllers, and it was the Xuantu controller who introduced you!" said the Bianhuo controller helplessly.

"Is the Xuantu controller involved in this matter?" Ye Tian asked, but he didn't think it would be, he saved the Xuantu controller, and the Xuantu controller's body was in the Origin Realm Sea, and the foundation was there, so he wouldn't look for death!

After all, once something happens, the Feng Heng controllers will definitely not let go of the Xuantu controllers.

"He didn't know, he thought I was really trapped!" said the Bian Huo controller truthfully, but he didn't go to the Xuantu controller, after all, he and the Xuantu controller are really friends, and there is no need to pit others.

"You're going to attract a few Nine Realm-level masters, what's the purpose, don't say it's fun!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"This ......"

The Border Fire Controller hesitated, obviously not wanting to speak.

"I don't want to say it, I'm a personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, and I know a lot of secret techniques, and there is no shortage of torturous secret techniques!

The Border Fire Controller trembled, he had naturally heard of the horrors of the Black Decay Controller.

Unless he commits suicide, there is no way to hide it.

"I said yes, but please don't kill me, after all, I didn't cause you any loss. The Rim Fire Master said.

Ye Tian thought for a while and said, "Yes, but you must give me everything you promised to us, and in addition, never appear in the Origin Realm Sea again, otherwise I won't kill you, and the Feng Heng Controllers won't spare you!"

"I promised!"

The Border Fire Master nodded.

Immediately, the Border Fire Controller gave Ye Tian the two Wanxiang statues and other treasures one by one, and then revealed an important piece of information.

"In the inner enclosure not far from here, I found an amazing treasure land, where there was a lot of Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, and there was also a Primordial Dao Fruit Tree. The Primordial Dao Fruit is very magical, it can forcibly break the shackles of people's will and turn into the will of the Transformation Realm. Although my foundation was damaged, and I absorbed the origin of the Origin Realm Sea in advance, it seems that I will never be able to achieve the will of the Transformation Realm, but if I obtain the Primal Dao Fruit and a large amount of Primordial Spiritual Spring Liquid, I can still break the shackles and achieve the will of the Transformation Realm, plus I continue to absorb the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, and I will not be assimilated by the Origin, and I definitely have the hope of reaching the peak of the Nine Realms in the future, so as to have the hope of impacting the Ten Realms. "

Said the Border Fire Master.

"Hopeful fart!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If he could use a liquid similar to the Primal Dao Fruit and a large amount of Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, he could give the Border Fire Controller a chance to attack the Ten Realm-level Masters, his senior brother would have broken through a long time ago.

But in fact, even his master couldn't let the senior brother complete the breakthrough.

Therefore, an eight-realm-level controller like the Border Fire Master, at most, used these Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid and Primordial Dao Fruit to ascend to the more powerful one of the Nine Realm-level controllers, but there was still no hope of breaking through to the Nine Realms-level controller.

Of course, he didn't have to say this to the Border Fire Master.

At this time, he was also a little excited.

After all, the Primal Dao Fruit and the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid were also extremely precious to him, if he obtained them, he would be able to reach the extreme of the Nine Realm-level Controllers faster, and it wouldn't even be long before he could attack the Ten-Realm-level Controllers.

Subsequently, Ye Tian asked for the specific location, and then directly took the border fire controller to that place, after all, he was also worried that the border fire controller would deceive him.

"After I obtain the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid and the Primordial Dao Fruit, I will release you!"

Ye Tian said.

......
